title: DebtEconomics
description: Specifies selected economics of a debt security.

seniority.description: Specifies the order of repayment in the event of a sale or bankruptcy of the issuer or a related party (eg guarantor).

interest.description: Specifies the general rule for periodic interest rate payment.

principal.description: Specifies the general rule for repayment of principal.

secured.description: Specifies the type of secured debt.

redemption.description: Specifies the general rule for redemption of a debt security.
